title: On The Same (On The Upright Judge, Who Condemned The Drapier's Printer)
content:
In church your grandsire cut his throat;
        To do the job too long he tarried:
    He should have had my hearty vote
        To cut his throat before he married.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Jonathan Swift delivers a powerful performance in "On The Same (On The Upright Judge, Who Condemned The Drapier's Printer)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
